title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Panalpina India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Panalpina India
jsonLd.description:
Panalpina India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Tiruchirappalli location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Panalpina India:
Panalpina India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Panalpina India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
